message:
feat: fix Shift+Enter, add sync delete and folder download

- Fix Shift+Enter outputting CSI escape sequence by consuming Shift
  modifier for non-printable keys (Enter, Tab, Backspace, etc.)
- Add delete_not_in_source flag (bit 2) to transfer protocol: server
  deletes files not in upload list after upload completes
- Add SYNC_DELETE_LIST (0x29) and DELETE_REPORT (0x3B) message types
  for explicit client-directed server file deletion
- Add local folder picker for downloads via showDirectoryPicker(),
  writing files directly to selected folder instead of zip
- Add "Delete files not in source" checkbox in transfer dialog
